name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a stiff white sauce: Melt the butter, add flour, and stir.
2. Add milk and bring to a boil. Cook until the sauce comes away from the sides of the pan and becomes stiff.
3. Let cool. Stir in garlic powder and onion powder, then mix in the flaked salmon.
4. Chill for 30 minutes.
5. Roll the mixture into balls about the size of walnuts.
6. Dip each ball first in slightly beaten eggs, then coat with soda cracker crumbs.
7. Deep fry until golden brown.
